Baseline Diagnostic Font

Overview

Font that can be used for validating baseline alignments. Given the embedded text in the font, this should be used with very large font sizes.

Baselines and Metrics

Baseline/Metric Coordinate BASE Value OS/2 Value hhea Value
ascent 800 sTypoAscender ascent
ideographic-over 750 idtp
hanging 650 hang
ideographic-face-over 650 icft
cap-height 550 sCapHeight
math 450 math
central 350
em-middle 300
x-height 250 sxHeight
x-middle 150
alphabetic 50 romn
ideographic-face-under 50 icfb
zero 0
ideographic-under -50 ideo
descent -200 sTypoDescender descent

The BaselineDiagnosticAlphabeticZero variant is the same as BaselineDiagnostic, except alphabetic moves to 0; x-middle moves to 125.

Glyphs

Diagnostic glyph

X (U+0058) draws all baselines with labels. Use at large font sizes.

X

BaselineDiagnostic at 250px

X

BaselineDiagnosticAlphabeticZero at 250px

Baseline pair glyphs

Each pair has a layout variant (opaque fill between the two baselines) and a labeled variant (lines with labels, like X). Labeled variants also show dashed reference lines for zero and em-middle.

PairLayoutLabeled
x-heightalphabetic
x
x (U+0078) 		χ
χ (U+03C7)
cap-heightalphabetic
B
B (U+0042) 		β
β (U+03B2)
ideographic-overideographic-under
口
口 (U+53E3) 		日
日 (U+65E5)
ideographic-face-overideographic-face-under
中
中 (U+4E2D) 		田
田 (U+7530)
hangingalphabetic
अ
अ (U+0905) 		आ
आ (U+0906)
mathalphabetic
+
+ (U+002B) 		±
± (U+00B1)

Em-box glyphs

Reference glyphs spanning the full em-box from ascent to descent. Use them as solid or outlined background blocks without any baseline markings.

█

█ (U+2588) — Filled

□

□ (U+25A1) — Outline

Source and Downloads

Both the source code and built font files can be found in the @sajidanwar.com/baseline-diagnostic-font repository on Tangled or the kbhomes/baseline-diagnostic-font repository on GitHub.

This font is built using Python with the fonttools library.

License

This font contains Noto Sans Mono glyphs in the rendering of its baseline labels. Like that font, this font is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1, and is available in the source repository.
